case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. NURIJA'S AUTO, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST AS TO DEFENDANT NURIJA'S AUTO, INC. MURATOVIC, NURIJA DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-21-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-19-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-06-2007

DECLARATION OF ERNEST I. KNOWLES RE: CCP 585(D) -IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NURIJA'S AUTO, INC. MURATOVIC, NURIJA POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE TEXT, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $13,579.86 DAMAGES, $1,700.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $430.00 COSTS, $174.84 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,884.70, PROPERTY VALUE - $15,000.00; EQUIPMENT -ONE GFS SELECT SEMI-DOWN DRAFT SPRAY BOOTH PACKAGE. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
